evals.prompt: I just added a new CLI tool to my project at cli/wordcount.ts. It's a simple word counter that reads from stdin. Run live checks on it before I commit.
evals.expected_output: Structured check report with domain classification (CLI), change type (feat), and results for argument parsing, exit codes, input handling, and output formatting

evals.prompt: My backend API in api/users.ts just got a new POST endpoint for creating users. Check it for security issues before I push to production.
evals.expected_output: Structured check report focused on security (SQL injection, input validation, auth), API contract validation, and error handling

evals.prompt: I'm refactoring a React component in src/UserProfile.tsx. The functionality should stay exactly the same. Run live checks to make sure I didn't break anything.
evals.expected_output: Structured check report with refactor change type, focusing on behavior preservation, accessibility, and common React bugs (memory leaks, state management)

evals.prompt: Quick check on this embedded C file - does it look correct for an ARM Cortex-M4 interrupt handler?
evals.expected_output: Structured check report for embedded domain, checking ISR correctness, memory safety, volatile usage, and no blocking operations

evals.prompt: I'm about to publish version 2.0.0 of my npm package @mycompany/utils. Run a final pre-publish check.
evals.expected_output: Structured check report for libs domain, checking public API surface, semver compliance, dependencies, documentation, and publishing configuration

evals.prompt: Run live checks on the mobile app I just modified - I added camera permission handling in the photo upload feature.
evals.expected_output: Structured check report for mobile domain, focusing on permissions, platform conventions, offline handling, and iOS/Android specifics
